title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入巴拉圭：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入巴拉圭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Paraguay INTN product conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards adopted by reference, ANDE grid-connection requirements, Bomberos Paraguay and local building authority fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements for landlocked routing via the Paraná hidrovía and Argentine or Brazilian ports, and 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与巴拉圭INTN产品合格评定要求、引用采纳的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、ANDE并网要求、巴拉圭消防局及地方建筑主管机关消防安全安装要求、经由巴拉那水道及阿根廷或巴西港口内陆路线的UN 38.3运输要求及50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與巴拉圭INTN產品合格評定要求、引用採納的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、ANDE併網要求、巴拉圭消防局及地方建築主管機關消防安全安裝要求、經由巴拉那水道及阿根廷或巴西港口內陸路線的UN 38.3運輸要求及50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INTN conformity scope determination, ANDE grid-connection approval, Bomberos Paraguay fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Paraguay INTN Technical Standards, ANDE grid-connection technical specifications, Bomberos Paraguay and local building authority fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INTN合格评定范围裁定、ANDE并网批准、巴拉圭消防局消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴拉圭INTN技术标准、ANDE并网技术规格、巴拉圭消防局及地方建筑主管机关消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INTN合格評定範圍裁定、ANDE併網批准、巴拉圭消防局消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴拉圭INTN技術標準、ANDE併網技術規格、巴拉圭消防局及地方建築主管機關消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Paraguay does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a dedicated national BESS technical regulation. BESS projects in Paraguay operate under INTN conformity requirements (adopting IEC standards by reference as NP norms) and ANDE technical approval as the state vertically-integrated monopoly utility and de-facto sector authority. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Paraguay are: (1) INTN conformity evidence referencing IEC 62619 cell and module safety as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance; (2) ANDE technical approval and grid-connection requirements, which must be obtained directly from ANDE as no publicly accessible standalone BESS grid-connection specification has been confirmed; (3) Bomberos Paraguay and local building authority fire-safety installation approval, where IEC 62933-5-2 and IEC 62619 are the expected technical references; (4) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions, with particular attention to landlocked routing logistics via the Paraná river hidrovía and Argentine or Brazilian ports; and (5) grid voltage configuration — Paraguay operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz, nominally the same as China, but ANDE connection agreement terms must be confirmed. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC-based evidence in INTN conformity or ANDE project review.
answer_first.zh: 巴拉圭尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或专用国家BESS技术法规相当。巴拉圭的BESS项目在INTN合格评定要求（以NP规范引用采纳IEC标准）和ANDE技术审批下运作，ANDE是国家垂直一体化垄断电力企业兼实际行业主管机关。中国BESS出口巴拉圭的实际差距包括：（1）以IEC 62619电芯和模组安全作为项目验收国际预期基准的INTN合格评定证据；（2）ANDE技术审批和并网要求，须直接向ANDE获取，目前尚无公开的独立BESS并网规格文件经确认；（3）巴拉圭消防局及地方建筑主管机关消防安全安装审批，预期以IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62619作为技术参考；（4）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件，需特别关注经由巴拉那河水道及阿根廷或巴西港口的内陆运输路线物流；（5）电网电压配置——巴拉圭运行参数为220/380 V 50 Hz，名义上与中国相同，但须确认ANDE并网协议条款。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在INTN合格评定或ANDE项目审查中不被接受为基于IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 巴拉圭尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或專用國家BESS技術法規相當。巴拉圭的BESS項目在INTN合格評定要求（以NP規範引用採納IEC標準）和ANDE技術審批下運作，ANDE是國家垂直一體化壟斷電力企業兼實際行業主管機關。中國BESS出口巴拉圭的實際差距包括：（1）以IEC 62619電芯和模組安全作為項目驗收國際預期基準的INTN合格評定證據；（2）ANDE技術審批和併網要求，須直接向ANDE獲取，目前尚無公開的獨立BESS併網規格文件經確認；（3）巴拉圭消防局及地方建築主管機關消防安全安裝審批，預期以IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62619作為技術參考；（4）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件，需特別關注經由巴拉那河水道及阿根廷或巴西港口的內陸運輸路線物流；（5）電網電壓配置——巴拉圭運行參數為220/380 V 50 Hz，名義上與中國相同，但須確認ANDE併網協議條款。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在INTN合格評定或ANDE項目審查中不被接受為基於IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
